title: Endurance with Neuromuscular Bursts
purpose: Aerobic base with neuromuscular fiber recruitment

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 68% for 67:30. Easy miles make fast racing. Stop overthinking.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 68% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 67:30 at 68%. Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 68%, 85-100 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 67:30 at 68-68%. Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/4. 85% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 85% complete. Rep 2/4. 150% at 95-110 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 85% through. This is your workout. Own it. 150% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2/4. 78 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 2 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 85% into session. 150%, 95-110 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 86% done. 1 intervals left. 11 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 3 of 4. Target: 150% FTP, 95-110 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 79 minutes of work done. 11 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 3/4. 150% FTP × 54s. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 150% for 54s. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 150% × 54s. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 54s at 150%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 150% for 54s. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 150% × 54s. Seated, 95-110 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 81 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 88% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 88% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
